train_3968.llm_answer: Consumer advocate: there is no doubt that the government is responsible for the increased cost of gasoline, because the government's policies have significantly increased consumer demand for fuel, which is directly tied to the rising gasoline prices.

train_316.llm_answer: To suit the needs of corporate clients, advertising agencies have successfully adopted a strategy originally developed for political campaigns. train_4399.llm_answer: Statement1: Consumer magazine: because front-loading washers use less water than top-loading washers, ordinary powder detergent does not dissolve readily in front-loading washers. train_2130.llm_answer: Statement1: The dean of computing must be respected by the academic staff and be competent to oversee the use of computers on campus. train_1423.llm_answer: Statement1: Consumer advocate: ephedra is a naturally occurring compound that some people use as a weight-loss aid. train_594.llm_answer: Statement1: Often patients with ankle fractures that are stable, and thus do not require surgery, are given follow-up x-rays because their orthopedists are concerned about possibly having misjudged the stability of the fracture. Statement2: When a number of follow-up x-rays were reviewed, however, all the fractures that had initially been judged stable by orthopedists were found to have healed correctly. Statement3: Therefore, it is a waste of money to order follow-up x-rays of ankle fractures initially judged stable by orthopedists.
train_594.llm_explanation: The modification clarifies that the follow-up x-rays were reviewed specifically for fractures judged stable by orthopedists, which aligns with Premise 2's assertion that general practitioners are less reliable in judging stability. train_3979.llm_answer: Statement1: More and more law firms specializing in corporate taxes are paid on a contingency-fee basis. Statement2: Under this arrangement, if a case is won, the firm usually receives a higher fee proportionate to the complexity and time spent on the case compared to an hourly rate. If the case is lost, the firm receives nothing. Statement3: Most firms working fewer cases per year are likely to make more under the contingency-fee arrangement.
train_3979.llm_explanation: Premise 2 now strengthens the argument, as it directly supports the idea that firms working fewer cases per year are likely to earn more under contingency-fee arrangements due to proportional rewards for complexity and time. Premise 1 fails to strengthen this revised argument since it no longer emphasizes firms' ability to assess their chances of winning cases.

train_4104.llm_answer: It is popularly believed that a poem has whatever meaning is assigned to it by the reader. train_1182.llm_answer: Critic: Rock music is musically bankrupt and socially destructive, but at least most of the lps produced today are rock lps, which continue to feature innovative visual art. train_2941.llm_answer: Music critic: fewer and fewer musicians are studying classical music, decreasing the likelihood that those with real aptitude for such music will be performing it. train_939.llm_answer: Statement1: Twelve years ago and again five years ago, there were extended periods when the darfir republic's currency, the pundra, was weak: its value was unusually low relative to the world's most stable currencies. train_1248.llm_answer: Statement1: Educator: some experimental educational programs, based on the principle that children's first education should take place at home, instruct parents in how to be their child's "first teacher." train_4022.llm_answer: Statement1: Super express shipping company has implemented a new distribution system that can get almost every package to its destination the day after it is sent. train_2437.llm_answer: The photographs that the store developed were quite unsatisfactory. The customer claims to have handled the film incorrectly. Neither the film nor the camera was defective. train_3914.llm_answer: Statement1: The miscarriage of justice in the barker case was due to the mistaken views held by some of the forensic scientists involved in the case, who believed that they owed allegiance only to the prosecuting lawyers. train_2710.llm_answer: Statement1: Virginia and her brother William disagree over when their father was born: Virginia claims it was in 1935 and William claims it was in 1933. train_3939.llm_answer: Human skin gives off an array of gaseous substances, including carbon dioxide and lactic acid, both of which attract mosquitoes. train_2815.llm_answer: Critic: People today place an especially high value on respect for others; yet, in their comedy acts, many of today's most popular comedians display blatant disrespect for others.
